name: cutpilot-ai-editor
description: Local-first AI video editing tools for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex inspect footage, plan cuts, and render locally.
interface.longDescription: A local-first AI video editing plugin. Codex understands narration and footage, authors an editable JSON cut plan, and renders with FFmpeg without uploading originals.
capabilities: First-class track lifecycle visibility mute lock ordering and snapping
Editable aspect ratio canvas and export resolution FPS overrides
Hierarchical asset bins search and missing-media relinking
Transcript segment reorder and delete editing
Multiple editable sequences and In Out zones
Standalone transparent ProRes 4444 Motion Graphics export
Premiere XML and expanded FCPXML import
Advanced EQ dynamics de-esser stereo and pitch
Chroma key and feathered shape masks
Editable curve speed ramps and reverse
Split trim razor ripple and gap editing
OpenAI image and named Seedance Kling Mureka SFX bridges
FCPXML Premiere XML and EDL interchange
interface.defaultPrompt: Use CutPilot to inspect my local footage, understand my narration, propose a dense cut, and render only after I approve the plan.
